context.projectOverview: Calendar planner — FINAL sprint. Sprint 1 = pure slotter (planSlots -> ProposedPlan). Sprint 2 = CalendarConnector interface + .ics connector. Sprint 3 = egress-gated Google connector + safe-title privacy + `calendar` config section. This Sprint 4 composes the SAFETY FLOW: `bober calendar plan` (live, no --dry-run/--export-ics) slots findings, writes a PENDING approval marker via the EXISTING approval gate, writes ZERO events until an ApprovedMarker exists; `bober calendar apply <checkpointId>` writes via the connector exactly once on approval, never on reject; a /tell-style constraint delta re-runs the slotter and re-proposes without writing. REUSE src/state/approval-state.ts + the existing /approve //reject //tell handlers — do NOT build a new approval mechanism.

completedSprints.title: Slotter + dry-run CLI
completedSprints.summary: planSlots(findings, busy, constraints) -> ProposedPlan { scheduled: PlanItem[], unscheduled[] }; src/cli/commands/calendar.ts runCalendarPlan core + CalendarPlanDeps. commit 0d141c1.

completedSprints.title: Connector + .ics
completedSprints.summary: src/calendar/connector.ts CalendarConnector { name, readFreeBusy, writeEvents }; createIcsConnector. --export-ics path. commit 0481407.

completedSprints.title: Google connector + egress
completedSprints.summary: createGoogleConnector (egress-gated, safe-title only); `calendar` config section (calendar.connector default 'ics', calendar.egress.cloudCalendar default false); CalendarEgressGuard. commit 123c7c4.

relevantFiles: src/state/approval-state.ts (REUSE: PendingMarker/ApprovedMarker/RejectedMarker + save/read/delete fns — the CURATOR will surface the EXACT exported function names; do NOT re-implement approval storage)
src/chat/slash-commands.ts:103-135 (existing /approve, /reject, /tell dispatch — reuse, do not duplicate)
src/calendar/connector.ts (CalendarConnector.writeEvents(items: PlanItem[]) — apply calls this exactly once on approval)
src/calendar/slotter.ts + src/calendar/types.ts (planSlots + SlotConstraints — adjustPlan re-runs slotter with a constraint delta, PURE, no write)
src/cli/commands/calendar.ts (extend: default `bober calendar plan` -> proposePlan; add `bober calendar apply <checkpointId>`; keep --dry-run and --export-ics paths unchanged)
src/cli/commands/do.ts + src/do-bridge/promote.ts (REFERENCE: how do-bridge reused approval-state markers via runPromotionGate — same machinery, mirror its marker usage)
.bober/principles.md (ESM .js imports, node:fs/promises, type-only imports, unicode section headers)
